title: Wrap ParseIntError for port parsing
scenario: Parsing configuration values should keep lower-level parse details while returning the loader error type.
instructions: Add InvalidPort(ParseIntError), implement From<ParseIntError>, and use ? in parse_port.

hints.body: Change InvalidPort into InvalidPort(ParseIntError), then add From<ParseIntError> for ConfigLoadError.
Add parse_port(value: &str) -> Result<u16, ConfigLoadError> and let value.parse::<u16>()? use your From implementation.
One complete solution for Wrap ParseIntError for port parsing is shown below.

completionExplanation: InvalidPort now preserves the underlying ParseIntError, parse_port returns the loader error type, and ? performs the conversion through From<ParseIntError>.
